title: gelsemium sumatranum
intro: Gelsemium sumatranum, also known as Yellow Jasmine or Tiger's Claw, is a perennial plant native to the tropical forests of Sumatra and Malaysia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Gelsemium sumatranum include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Gelsemium sumatranum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions when used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
